content: This has probably been asked for to death, but it'd be nice if we could filter/search for specific Awakener/covenants supports in-game without having to rely on other players' UID referrals on Discord? If I just keep refreshing, I'll eventually run into the rare Nymphaea whale with +12 and a perfect set of covenants to add as a friend for a rainy day, but before that happens, I'll run into hundreds of Tawil +12 with Dreams of Medicine identical to 50 other people already on my friends list. It'd just be good QoL
can't you already filter per character?
On the Support select page yeah. But not for the actual friend search
